# 한글 배우기 — Learn Hangul

> Free bilingual resource for learning the Korean Hangul writing system.
> Covers the alphabet, syllable block structure, pronunciation, romanization, IPA, and beginner grammar.

## Core Reference Pages

- Consonants (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/consonants
- Vowels (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/vowels
- Syllable Blocks (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/blocks
- Batchim Guide (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/batchim
- Romanization Guide (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/romanization-guide
- IPA Guide (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/ipa-guide
- English Learner Guide (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/english-guide
- Grammar Basics (EN): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/en/grammar

## Dutch Language Pages

- Medeklinkers (NL): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/nl/consonants
- Klinkers (NL): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/nl/vowels
- Nederlandse Leerdersgids (NL): https://korean.youcanlearn.it/nl/dutch-guide

## Practice Tools

- Quiz: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/quiz
- Pronunciation Breakdown: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/pronounce
- Syllable Builder: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/builder
- Syllable Chart: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/syllable-chart
- Typing Practice: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/typing
- Contrast Drills: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/contrast-drills

## Citation Notes

The site is free to use and may be cited with attribution to 한글 배우기 / Learn Hangul.
Canonical URLs are listed in the sitemap: https://korean.youcanlearn.it/sitemap.xml
